run.window_expansion_reason: Strict 72h window (May 29–Jun 1) yielded 5 verified items; expanded to 5 days (May 27–Jun 1) to add 2 items (YouTube labels May 27, OpenAI model retirements ~May 28).

items.title: GitHub Copilot transitions to AI Credits billing

key_claims.claim: Pro plan: $10/month including $10 monthly AI Credits
Pro+ plan: $39/month including $39 monthly AI Credits
Business: $19/user/month including $19 credits plus $30 bonus through August
Enterprise: $39/user/month including $39 credits plus $70 bonus through August
Code completions and Next Edit suggestions remain free across all plans
Community announcement received 400+ comments and ~900 downvotes

items.caveats: Annual plan subscribers remain on existing pricing until plan expiry.

items.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash API deprecated

key_claims.claim: gemini-2.0-flash API calls return errors from June 1, 2026
Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite priced identically to 2.0 Flash ($0.10/$0.40 per 1M tokens in/out)
Gemini 2.5 Flash costs approximately 3x more on input than 2.0 Flash

items.caveats: Pricing figures for Gemini 2.5 models cited from third-party cost tracker; verify against Google's current pricing page.

items.title: Claude Code v2.1.157-158: Plugin auto-loading and cloud auto mode

key_claims.claim: v2.1.157 (May 29): Plugins in .claude/skills now auto-load without marketplace
v2.1.157: claude plugin init <name> scaffolds new plugins
v2.1.158 (May 30): Auto mode available on Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry for Opus 4.7 and 4.8
Auto mode opt-in via CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AUTO_MODE=1

items.title: Microsoft to unveil homegrown AI coding model at Build 2026

key_claims.claim: Microsoft plans to unveil a suite of in-house AI models at Build 2026 (June 2-3, San Francisco)
Suite includes coding, transcription, reasoning, speech, and image models
Coding model targets GitHub Copilot market share recovery from Claude Code
MS stock rose ~3% on report

cross_refs.role: corroborating — context on Copilot adoption decline

items.caveats: Pre-announcement; capabilities not yet disclosed. Microsoft declined to comment. Prior Copilot coding efforts have underperformed rivals. Report sourced from Reuters; direct Reuters URL not retrievable.

items.title: YouTube rolls out automatic AI content detection and labeling

key_claims.claim: Automatic detection begins May 2026 using C2PA metadata, SynthID watermarks, and internal signals
Labels moved to below video player on long-form and bottom-left overlay on Shorts
No algorithm penalties or monetization impact from AI labels

items.title: OpenAI announces GPT-4.5 and o3 retirement from ChatGPT

key_claims.claim: GPT-4.5 retires from ChatGPT June 27, 2026 (30-day sunset)
o3 retires from ChatGPT August 26, 2026 (90-day sunset)
API access to GPT-4.5 and o3 unchanged

items.caveats: Primary page returned HTTP 403 from research environment. Pub date (~May 28) inferred from retirement date minus sunset periods; secondary sources confirm.

items.title: Indonesia launches .ai.id country-code domain for AI ecosystem

key_claims.claim: Official launch: May 29, 2026
Sunrise registration phase (trademark holders): June 2 – July 2, 2026
General availability: October 5, 2026
Organized by KORIKA and PANDI

cross_refs.role: corroborating — Ministry of Communication & Digital backing

No new MCP server launches confirmed in this window; category underrepresented.
No agent framework releases (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen) confirmed in window.
X/Twitter and LinkedIn timelines not accessible; public posts via search-engine index captured for @AnthropicAI, @OpenAI, @MistralAI, @xai, @GoogleDeepMind.
US/EU-heavy coverage; one SEA regional search yielded the Indonesia .ai.id item.
Microsoft Build 2026 (June 2-3) falls just outside the window; announcements will be covered in the next bulletin.
